name: Tokyo Seimitsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Tokyo Seimitsu Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells semiconductor production equipment (SPE) and metrology instruments in Japan, Taiwan, China, and internationally. The company operates through SPE and Metrology Equipment segments. It provides wafer probing machines, wafer dicing machines, polish grinders, wafer manufacturing machines, chemical mechanical planarizers, precision dicing blades, and high rigid grinders. The company also offers multipurpose measuring instruments, including coordinate measuring machines, surface texture and contour measuring instruments, roundness and cylindrical profile measuring instruments, and optical measuring instruments. In addition, it provides automatic measuring instruments, such as in process and post process gauge products, various types of sensors and electric/air micrometers, high precision digital measurement instruments, and laser interferometer/built-in measuring instruments. The company was formerly known as Tokyo Seimitsu Kogu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tokyo Seimitsu Co., Ltd. in April 1962. The company was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.
